Container.Name: pubg-tracker-bot
Container.Overview: Discord bot that monitors PUBG matches, analyzes telemetry, and posts match summaries and coaching insights.
Container.Requires: Requires an existing PostgreSQL database reachable from this container.

Config.Name: Discord Token
Config.Description: Discord bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Discord Channel ID
Config.Description: Discord channel ID where match summaries are posted.

Config.Name: PUBG Shard
Config.Description: PUBG platform shard, such as steam, kakao, psn, or xbox.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string for your existing database, for example postgresql://user:password@postgres:5432/pubg_tracker.

Config.Name: Check Interval MS
Config.Description: How often to check for new matches, in milliseconds.

Config.Name: Max Matches To Process
Config.Description: Maximum number of new matches processed per polling cycle.

Config.Name: LLM Coaching Enabled
Config.Description: Set to true to enable OpenRouter-backed coaching narration.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: Optional OpenRouter API key used when LLM coaching is enabled.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter model name used for coaching narration.
